visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A close-up shot shows a sharp silver knife slicing through a thick, golden-brown marshmallow cereal bar resting on white parchment paper. The bar is coated in cornflakes and pumpkin seeds. (2) A young woman with her hair in a high bun, wearing a white ribbed tank top and denim overalls, takes a large bite of the bar, closing her eyes in satisfaction. (3) She presents a bag of Kellogg's Granola to the camera, then pours the cereal into a glass bowl. She eats a spoonful and makes an exaggerated, delightful facial expression. (4) The scene shifts to a kitchen counter where she pours marshmallows into a bowl, followed by a pat of butter. She places the bowl into a white microwave. (5) She pours granola into the melted marshmallow mixture, stirring it with a wooden spoon to show the sticky, stretchy texture. She then presses the mixture into a rectangular shape on a tray using her hands in black gloves. (6) After refrigeration, she slices the bar. She stands in a bright kitchen with three plates of different colored cereal bars. (7) A montage follows showing different flavors of the product being eaten with yogurt, milk, or straight from the bag, while she holds up the various packaging designs.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 聽這聲音就知道多好吃. [Variety]: 超讚. (2) [Logo]: Kellogg's. [Slogan]: 我先走了(≧▽≦). [Variety]: (表情管理失敗). [Subtitle]: 奶油：我有惹你嗎?. (3) [Subtitle]: 微波 600W 1 分鐘. [Variety]: (愛的魔力轉圈圈). [Variety]: (修喔就軌). (4) [Variety]: (手臂炸裂). [Variety]: (攪拌攪拌). [Variety]: (大牽絲~~). [Variety]: (按壓塑形). (5) [Subtitle]: 放入冷藏半小時. [Variety]: (冰了半小時後). [Subtitle]: 今天是重訓日嗎?. (6) [Subtitle]: 棉花糖餅完成. 甜而不膩口的蜂蜜味麥片. 搭配上杏仁跟穀物的香氣. 一口接一口停不下來啊~. (7) [Subtitle]: 家樂氏日本纖穀脆系列推出新口味. 蜂蜜杏仁口味. 還有濃郁草莓香氣的鮮摘草莓. 以及大人味的榛果可可口味. 簡單就可以做出超少女又超好吃的棉花糖餅. 搭配優格及牛奶一級棒~~. 單吃更能展現纖穀脆的美味. 好吃一起吃. (8) [Variety]: ㄟ 你們也吃一口啦!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator presenting and cooking.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with dark hair styled in a bun. She wears a white ribbed tank top under light blue denim overalls, appearing energetic and cheerful.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern kitchen with white cabinetry, a silver refrigerator, a microwave oven, and a wooden-top island counter.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with loud, amplified crunching sounds of biting and chewing, creating a crisp ASMR effect. There is no music. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect marks a visual transition, and a fast-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track with a strong drum beat kicks in. (3) A series of metallic clinks, rustling plastic, and the mechanical hum of a microwave follow, punctuated by comedic 'boing' and 'sparkle' sound effects. (4) An energetic male narrator enters with a clear, professional voiceover, describing product features. His speech rate is fast and enthusiastic. (5) The female character’s voice appears briefly at the end with a cheerful, high-arousal tone, accompanied by a final bright 'ding' sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Tutorial -> Showcase -> Promotional Pitch -> Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Kellogg's Granola series by demonstrating its versatility in a home-made marshmallow cereal bar recipe and highlighting new flavors with high energy.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of Kellogg's product bags, narrator detailing flavors, and explicit call to try the product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly produced social media ad combining ASMR, DIY recipe content, and energetic narration to drive product awareness.
